name: bivex--kanboard-skill
description: Interact with Kanboard project management via JSON-RPC API. Use when working with Kanboard tasks, projects, boards, columns, swimlanes, comments, subtasks, and users. Trigger on: "create task", "move task", "show board", "list projects", "add comment", "kanboard", "kanban task". Supports both Application API (token) and User API (login/password).
